comment: OpenRouter MCP example — how to use Calliope TS as a tool for stateful agents via OpenRouter API

messages.content: Scan this poem and tell me its meter and rhyme scheme: Shall I compare thee to a summer's day? Thou art more lovely and more temperate.

curl_test_scan_poem: curl -X POST http://localhost:7860/mcp -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'Accept: application/json, text/event-stream' -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"scan_poem","arguments":{"text":"Shall I compare thee to a summer'\''s day?\nThou art more lovely and more temperate","detail_level":"summary"}}}'
